response.original_title: Dano Drevo a Turnaj Mekyho Žbirku
response.overview: Dubbed in 2012-2016. In this film, with the help of Gombit's raven-haired nephew, the megastar Meky Žbirka targets Dan, who needs a new face after falling into a bath of acid in Patince. Therefore, he decides to organize a tournament at Hogwarts, among the competitors of which he discreetly nominates Dan, because he has never had a single fucker in his life. The French slut Zuzana de Merde also competes in the tournament, and to the great joy of Professor Šlot, the Olaš Gypsy Šaňo Fekete and the Hungarian alpha male Gábor Székesfehervárbalatonszavadisóstó from the aforementioned mechanical engineering school in Bodrogszerdahely. The dragon Rastislav Synek, whom Dano is tasked with eliminating in the first discipline of the tournament, was voiced by Ladislav Meliško himself a few months before his death.
response.title: Dano Drevo a Turnaj Mekyho Žbirku
